summary: Frontend testing of NULLAI Tokenomics live on-chain telemetry. All 10 review-request assertions verified on the public preview URL. RPC failover settled to https://base.publicnode.com (LIVE), live grid renders correct values matching eth_call totalSupply on contract 0x86aC40CD4c57f68E89c515BF45d9fD19d7CcF095, Scarcity Pulse shows 0.0000% with BEATING badge, static V2 spec row preserved, refresh button triggers a new fetch and keeps LIVE state, no console errors observed.
verified_assertions: tokenomics-live-grid renders 4 cells (totalsupply, burned, burnratio, scarcity-pulse)
scarcity-pulse-value contains '0.0000%' and parent has 'BEATING' badge text
tokenomics-item-0/1/2 render V2 static values exactly: '1,000,000,000 NULLAI', '1,000,000 NULLAI (0.1%)', '100% of liquidity raised on PinkSale will be automatically locked'
tokenomics-refresh-btn click triggers new fetch — pill remains 'RPC · BASE MAINNET' and sync resets to 'just now'
Smart Contracts, Audit verdict, Whitepaper, Footer regression sections all still render unchanged
No console errors; RPC settled on base.publicnode.com (200 response)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ScarcityPulse <style> block injects keyframes inside the rendered tree which leaks into element textContent (visible in test text dumps). Consider moving keyframes to a global stylesheet (index.css) to keep DOM text clean — does not affect functionality.

Minor: useNullaiOnChain uses Date.now() as JSON-RPC id and refetches every 15s; consider AbortController on unmount to cancel in-flight fetch (currently aliveRef gates state updates which is acceptable).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tokenomics live telemetry feature is fully functional. RPC failover order in useNullaiOnChain.js currently lands on base.publicnode.com on this preview environment. The 4th cell in the live grid is the Scarcity Pulse component (data-testid='scarcity-pulse' with inner data-testid='scarcity-pulse-value'); it is NOT a StatCard, so do not assert a 'LIVE' badge — assert 'BEATING' instead. Wait at least 4-5s after page load for RPC to settle before asserting LIVE state.
